title: carduus nigrescens subsp. spinigerus
intro: Carduus nigrescens subsp. spinigerus, also known as spiny black thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including gastrointestinal problems and skin conditions. Furthermore, the spiny black thistle has been shown to have potential anti-cancer properties, making it a promising area of research in modern herbal medicine.
